results.rendered_html:
pañca—rātra or pañca—rā˚traka, m. a period of 5 days (nights),  Kauś. ;  Mn.  &c.;
(˚tra), mfn. lasting 5 days,  ŚBr. ;  MBh.  (also ˚traka,  Pañc. );
m. N. of an Ahīna (see 1. ah˚) which lasts 5 days,  TāṇḍBr. ;  ŚrS. ;
N. of the sacred books of various Vaiṣṇava sects (also pl.),  MBh. ;  R.  &c.
